_comment: HOW TO ADD A NEW RESOURCE: 1) Upload your finished tool's .html file to the repo root (same folder as index.html). 2) Add one object here with that exact filename in 'file'. Schema: tag (short label), cats (array of any category strings — filter pills on resources.html build themselves from whatever appears here), title, desc, meta (e.g. '287 questions · 16 chapters'), file. For a tool that isn't built yet, omit 'file' and add "soon": true instead — it'll show as a placeholder card and won't appear in the homepage preview.
title: Essential 333 — Vocabulary Drill
desc: All 333 high-frequency exam words (Barron's 333) as IBA/GRE-level MCQs: context, synonym, antonym & definition, with score tracking and a review-mistakes mode.

title: Spelling MCQ Test
desc: Exam-style spelling practice for BB AD and bank written tests, covering around 1,000 important spelling words. Pick the correct spelling, get instant feedback, review what you missed.

title: Comprehension Drill
desc: Short passages with targeted MCQs to build reading speed and accuracy under exam pressure.

title: Math Shortcuts Pack
desc: Fast methods for arithmetic, ratios and number properties — the recurring question types in admission and bank tests.

title: University Study Notes
desc: Clean, organized notes and summaries for core university courses, downloadable as PDFs.
